output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?year ?deficit ?taxRevenue WHERE {
  wd:Q7318652 p:P2295 ?deficitStatement .
  ?deficitStatement ps:P2295 ?deficit ; pq:P585 ?deficitTime .
  wd:Q7318652 p:P2296 ?revenueStatement .
  ?revenueStatement ps:P2296 ?taxRevenue ; pq:P585 ?revenueTime .
  BIND(YEAR(?deficitTime) AS ?deficitYear)
  BIND(YEAR(?revenueTime) AS ?revenueYear)
  FILTER(?deficitYear = ?revenueYear)
  FILTER(?deficitYear >= 2017 && ?deficitYear <= 2021)
  BIND(?deficitYear AS ?year)
  FILTER isNumeric(?deficit)
  FILTER isNumeric(?taxRevenue)
}
ORDER BY ?year
